title: vaccinium neglectum var. harbisonii
intro: Vaccinium neglectum var. harbisonii, also known as the harbison's blueberry, is a rare and endemic variety of the Vaccinium neglectum species, a type of shrub native to New Zealand. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Vaccinium neglectum var. harbisonii may include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and berries, which can be used in teas, infusions, and other folk remedies.
